overall.description: A stationary view of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, with futuristic vehicles passing by under the glow of neon billboards and streetlights. The scene features tall glass and metal buildings with holographic advertisements reflecting off wet asphalt. High-fidelity game engine footage depicting a dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban arterial road with holographic advertising towers

events.description: red futuristic sedan drives past the camera from right to left in the near lane
yellow taxi with illuminated roof sign passes by in the center lane

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of traffic flow and neon-lit cityscape from sidewalk position

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving past the camera position heading away from the viewer
black sports car accelerating down the right lane away from camera

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in glowing purple and blue holographic advertisements and neon signage
horizontal structure spanning the street with bright linear white neon lights
tall modern building with reflective glass windows rising above the street
multi-lane road surface glistening with rain reflections and yellow lane markings
raised pedestrian walkway with metal railings separating it from the street
concrete and metal construction barriers lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: A stationary nighttime view of a rain-slicked cyberpunk downtown street illuminated by vibrant neon billboards and overhead light structures. Futuristic vehicles including a red sedan and yellow taxi pass by on the wet asphalt, while holographic advertisements glow against the glass towers. The camera remains fixed on the sidewalk, capturing the steady flow of traffic through the dense urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, atmospheric view of a rain-soaked cyberpunk downtown street defined by the constant flow of futuristic traffic. It begins with a fixed perspective on the sidewalk, where vibrant neon billboards and overhead light structures cast colorful reflections across the wet asphalt. As the scene unfolds, a red sedan and a yellow taxi glide through the dense urban canyon, their movements highlighting the slick texture of the road. The view remains anchored as holographic advertisements continue to glow against the towering glass and metal facades, maintaining a steady rhythm of light and motion within the nocturnal city.
